title: Blonde Ransom
writer: M. Coates Webster, Robert T. Shannon
actors: Donald Cook, Virginia Grey, Pinky Lee
plot: Vicki Morrison is the niece of the irascible old scoundrel Uncle William Morrison. When Vicki's boyfriend and owner of a Broadway nightclub Duke Randall needs $63,000 in a hurry, Vicki fakes her own kidnapping to raise the ransom ...
